ch: 我是卡那卡那富族的小孩。

en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: ’utumʉkʉnʉ ku mataa cuma, cina, kana’ua sarunai, kana’ua nanakʉ.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: marʉngʉcai cuma maku. kesacu sua cuma maku.
ch: 我的爸爸很高。我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: ta’uici cina maku. ’iseeng sua cina maku.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦。我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Kanakanavu language with us at home.

ab: tarasangara kana’ʉcana paira kim pui’i tanasʉn.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: arakukunu ku mataa kana’ua nanakʉ matisa’ʉ takarura.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.
I like our family very much.
